member.name: M:NetworkVersionInfo.#ctor(SemanticVersion,SemanticVersion)
member.summary: Version of the protobuf schema in use by the network

member.name: M:NetworkVersionInfo.#ctor(SemanticVersion,SemanticVersion)_2
member.summary: Version of the Hedera services in use by the network

member.name: M:NetworkVersionInfo.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create a network version info object from a byte array.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:NetworkVersionInfo.FromProtobuf(Proto.NetworkGetVersionInfoResponse)
member.summary: Create a network version info object from a protobuf.
